targets.description: Allowlisted alpha target data for the Sweetie HD RealLive vertical. This is an explicit target record, not the generic localize-project default shape.

Allowlisted alpha target data for the LustMemory RPG Maker MV/MZ vertical (alpha second-engine-family slice). The engine identity block selects the MV/MZ JSON extract/patchback/delta + text-trace runtime path.
